What's Inside

Everything you need to train like a pro — straight from Coach Kenny's competition playbook.

💪

6-Day Training Split

Full days dedicated to Back, Chest, Legs, Shoulders, Arms, and HIIT — each with 8 targeted movements using supersets and tri-sets.

🥗

Approved Food List

Coach Kenny's exact competition nutrition list — proteins, carbs, vegetables, condiments, and approved drinks to fuel your training.

📅

Workout Tracker 2025 & 2026

Full calendar workout trackers for both years so you can plan, track, and stay accountable throughout your entire transformation.

📊

Client Measurements Chart

Track your neck, chest, waist, hips, thigh, arm, and body fat % over time to measure real progress beyond just the scale.

📋

Post-Workout Questionnaire

A structured post-session checklist to evaluate energy levels, performance, and progress — the same tool Coach Kenny uses with clients.

🔥

High Intensity Supersets

Every training day is packed with supersets and tri-sets designed to maximize muscle activation and accelerate body composition changes.
